content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Meeting Rooms II". Refer to LeetCode description: https://leetcode.com/problems/meeting-rooms-ii/
content.inputFormat: intervals: array of arrays of two integers, where each inner array represents the start and end time of a meeting

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Sort the intervals by start time and use a priority queue to keep track of the end times of the meetings
